name: Gingersnaps
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:30
1. Cream the shortening in a bowl.
2. Gradually add 1 cup of sugar to the creamed shortening, beating at medium speed with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
3. Add the egg and molasses; mix well until combined.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, ground cinnamon, and ground ginger in another bowl.
5. Mix the dry ingredients into the wet mixture gradually, about a quarter at a time, ensuring smoothness after each addition.
6. Chill the dough for at least 1 hour before proceeding.
7. Shape the chilled dough into 1-inch balls.
8. Roll each ball in sugar to coat evenly.
9. Place the coated balls on ungreased cookie sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
10. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes. The tops may crack during baking.
11. Allow cookies to cool on wire racks.
